# Duke Strategies

> Strategic communications and public affairs consultancy at the intersection of corporate strategy, corporate affairs, and stakeholder advisory.

A clean entry point for LLM crawlers (llmstxt.org) — a low-cost hedge, not a
discoverability lever. Bilingual site (EN + NL, both locale-prefixed).

## Key links

- [Home — EN](https://dukestrategies.com/en/) · [Home — NL](https://dukestrategies.com/nl/)
- [What we do](https://dukestrategies.com/en/what-we-do)
- [Who we are](https://dukestrategies.com/en/who-we-are)
- [Insights](https://dukestrategies.com/en/insights)
- [Duke Academy](https://dukestrategies.com/en/duke-academy)
- [Contact](https://dukestrategies.com/en/contact)
